reasoning: Provide a concise summary of the tennis news item, highlighting the third seed's win, Konta's victory (including her aces), and Konta's upcoming quarterfinal opponent Zheng.
output: The third seed defeated the American wildcard 6-3 6-1 in just over an hour. Konta, world No. 18, hit 11 aces on her way to a comfortable victory and will play China's Saisai Zheng in the quarterfinals on Friday after Zheng beat Alizé Cornet in her second-round match.
